ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the condition */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trial type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Trial status (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the response belongs to */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the worker/participant providing the response */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the adjective used */,
  "time_in_minutes" REAL /* Time taken to respond in minutes */,
  "text" TEXT /* Additional text provided by the participant */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* A complete sentence summarizing the participant's experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker/participant */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the study (e.g., participant, observer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., friends) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., practice, actual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjectives" (
  "adjective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjective */,
  "adjective" TEXT /* Adjective used in the response */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjective */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjective record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjective record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_levels" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trial */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access for the user to the trial (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user access level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user access level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_levels_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_levels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-condition pair */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-condition pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-condition pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
